ItacPersonItem.Notes: Ambassador for the Duke of Mantua to the Courts of Vienna and France. Author of the fable Elisa. Joined the Ricovrati in 1680. In 1683, in the same Accademia, he discussed the problem: `Se sia piu` chiaro indizio di nobilta` la virtu` o la bellezza`.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
